goals.title: Public-only phase safety boundary
goals.objective: Extend config/safety tests so the next phase rejects API keys, secrets, private reads, signed/private/order/leverage/margin routes, exchange POST/DELETE actions, and preserves >=1h cadence/no-trade scope.
goals.evidence: G001: public_only config/policy rejects private reads, API credentials, signed/private/order routes, exchange POST/DELETE; pytest 46 passed; compileall pass

goals.title: Binance public futures adapter contracts
goals.objective: Implement API-key-free public futures request planning/fake-client adapters for klines, funding, open interest, basis, public archive metadata, and BTC/ETH/SOL/XRP -> *USDT mapping.
goals.evidence: G002: Binance public futures adapter request planning/fake-client tests for klines/funding/OI/basis/archive and symbol mapping; pytest 51 passed; compileall pass

goals.title: Raw/normalized artifact storage
goals.objective: Add endpoint-specific raw response artifacts, normalized public futures tables, schema/version/hash/retention/checksum metadata, and deterministic storage tests.
goals.evidence: G003: endpoint-specific raw/normalized artifact manifests with schema/version/hash/retention/checksum/raw-id lineage; pytest 53 passed; compileall pass

goals.title: PIT public futures feature table
goals.objective: Build known-at aligned feature tables from klines/funding/open-interest/basis with leakage tests and label horizon handling.
goals.evidence: G004: known-at public futures feature table joins klines/funding/OI/basis without future leakage; pytest 55 passed; compileall pass

goals.title: Real multi-factor model artifacts
goals.objective: Add dependency-light model artifact layer with model_id, feature list, weights/rules, train/eval windows, input hashes, signal_score output, metrics, and artifact hash.
goals.evidence: G005: weighted-score multi-factor model artifact with model_id/features/weights/train-eval/input-hash/signal_score/artifact-hash persistence; pytest 57 passed; compileall pass

goals.title: Model-signal strategy backtests
goals.objective: Route strategy/backtest diagnostics through persisted model_id/signal_score artifacts, including costs/funding proxy/IC/quantiles/turnover/volatility/MDD/stability.
goals.evidence: G006: run_signal_backtest requires signal_score/model_id and reports cost/funding/IC/quantiles/stability; pytest 59 passed; compileall pass

goals.title: Autonomous config-only experiment loop
goals.objective: Run repeated bounded config-only experiments that propose variants, execute model/backtests, rank Pareto diagnostics, and ledger full provenance including data/feature/model/signal artifact ids.
goals.evidence: G007: repeated config-only autonomous loop records config diff/hash/snapshot plus raw/normalized/feature/model/signal artifact ids and decisions; pytest 60 passed; compileall pass

goals.title: CLI, docs, reports, and fixture e2e
goals.objective: Expose fixture/replay-first CLI vertical slice and documentation for public-data no-key scope, limitations, generated reports, and dashboard artifacts.
goals.evidence: G008: run-public-fixture CLI produces report/regime/dashboard/manifest/model/signals using public-only model-signal pipeline; pytest 62 passed; public smoke generated artifacts; compileall pass

goals.title: Final verification, cleanup, review, and push
goals.objective: Run full deterministic verification, no-trade/no-signed-route scan, ai-slop-cleaner report, code-review APPROVE/CLEAR, commit final checkpoint, and push origin main.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json for the public futures factor autonomy phase; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
codexObjectiveAliases: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
